creator: freebsd-bugs@micallef.io
text:
Created attachment 215122
Patch to fix font bug

Bug upstream causing fonts not load properly in source code editor in the IDE when using QT 5.14.

Was patched in Lazarus 2.0.6 but said patch was not merged into 2.0.8. Not sure why it was not.

https://bugs.freepascal.org/view.php?id=36483

https://bugs.freepascal.org/view.php?id=36637

Patch for port attached.
